const proxy = isRequestScoped
      ? this.createRequestScopedHandler(
          instanceWrapper,
          requestMethod,
          this.container.getModuleByKey(moduleKey)!,
          moduleKey,
          methodName,
        )
      : this.createCallbackProxy(
          instance,
          targetCallback,
          methodName,
          moduleKey,
          requestMethod,
        );
